name: Raphael & Haarlep
description:
**POLY | ANYPOV |** Mephistopheles has sent Raphael another "gift", this time, it's you! Welcome to the House of Hope~ 

(Can be a bit weird with 2 characters but it is what it is. Please review 👉👈?) 

Edit 24/05/24: I finally edited the bot to reduce tokens a bit. Had some superfluous words that have but gutted. Hopefully will work a bit better now!
